tags.name: Description
tags.value: During a recent protest for the death of Henry Nowak, a protester throws the police with a garbage bin / wheelie bin, the occurrence quickly turning into an online meme. Two samples of such seen in this X-post.

tags.name: Description
tags.value: During a recent protest for the death of Henry Nowak, a protester throws the police with a garbage bin / wheelie bin, the occurrence quickly turning into an online meme. A sample of such is seen here - this one was clearly generated with an AI and refers to Nowak telling the police that he's been stabbed (seen in the officially released bodycam video), to which the police responds "I don't think you have, mate"
